downloaded_assets.title: Government of Madhya Pradesh Logo
downloaded_assets.description: Official logo of the Government of Madhya Pradesh featuring the state map and community symbol
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Circular logo with a central map of Madhya Pradesh in orange/red gradient, surrounded by a ring of stylized figures in various colors (saffron, blue, teal, green) representing community and people.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Multicolor: Saffron (#FF9933), Sky Blue, Green, Teal. Works best on white or light neutral headers.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Official Government of Madhya Pradesh Logo
downloaded_assets.license_notes: Official government emblem for use in administrative contexts
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Primary official logo for the department's parent government body.

downloaded_assets.title: State Emblem of India
downloaded_assets.description: The Ashoka Lion Capital, official emblem of the Republic of India
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Black and white render of the Lion Capital of Ashoka with the motto 'Satyamev Jayate' written in Devanagari script at the base. Sharp, clear lines suitable for official documents.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: State Emblem of India - Ashoka Lion Capital
downloaded_assets.license_notes: Public domain in India for official use
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Required for a Government of India feel; provides high administrative authority to the UI.

downloaded_assets.title: Energy Transmission at Sunset
downloaded_assets.description: High-voltage transmission towers against a vibrant orange and blue sky
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A tall electricity pylon stands centrally against a dramatic sky with horizontal bands of bright orange, yellow, and blue. Silhouette of hills and industrial buildings in the far distance.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Dominant: Saffron orange (#FF8C00), Deep Blue (#1E90FF), Yellow. Saffron tones match the Indian flag's primary color.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Power transmission towers silhouetted against a vibrant orange sunset
downloaded_assets.attribution: Photo by Chu Chup Hinh on Pexels
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Best match for 'Energy Department' feel — cinematic, infrastructure-focused, and the saffron sky provides a natural patriotic undertone.

downloaded_assets.title: Industrial Power Grid Silhouette
downloaded_assets.description: Multiple transmission lines and towers under a dark sunset sky
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A more industrial, moody shot featuring two large transmission towers in silhouette. The sky is dark blue with a narrow band of orange light on the horizon. Power lines crisscross the frame dramatically.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Dominant: Dark Navy (#2C3332), Sunset Orange. Good for dark mode or high-contrast themes.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Industrial power grid towers silhouetted against a dark sunset
downloaded_assets.attribution: Photo by Jonathan Borba on Pexels
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Alternative option if a darker, more technical infrastructure look is preferred over the vibrant sunset.

downloaded_assets.title: Saffron and White Soft Gradient
downloaded_assets.description: Subtle abstract gradient texture inspired by the Indian flag
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Soft, out-of-focus gradient shifting from a warm saffron orange to a creamy white. Very smooth, minimal texture, ideal for background washes.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Saffron (#EEC1AA) to White. Pairs perfectly with official Indian government palettes.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Soft saffron and white gradient background
downloaded_assets.attribution: Photo by Eva Bronzini on Pexels
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Provides the requested flag-inspired wash without being a literal flag image, maintaining a professional admin feel.

css_textures.description: Subtle grid pattern to reinforce the 'tracking' and 'data' nature of the app
css_textures.recommended_for: The main dashboard container beneath cards
css_textures.combine_with: Layer over a very light grey (#f8f9fa) background

usage_notes: Place the MP Government logo on the top left and the State Emblem of India in the center or top right of the header to match official government layouts.
Use 'hero-transmission-sunset-2' as the main hero image with a white or semi-transparent overlay for text readability.
Apply 'bg-gradient-tricolor' at 10-20% opacity as a background wash for the entire page or specific hero sections to give it a subtle patriotic feel.
Ensure all text is high-contrast, preferably using a professional serif font for headings (like Lora or Merriweather) to enhance the official administrative look.
